examples: A glorious well-oiled angel rides on a winged unicorn.
In the forest roams a unicorn which does great harm, and you must catch it first.
Captain Turner was neither the first traveler nor the last, to be promised sight of a unicorn.
So is it all rainbows and butterflies now that the elusive unicorn has been caught?
Is it a ride on a unicorn over a rainbow through a glitter storm?
